---
title: "Hands-on_Exercise 5A"
subtitle: "add subtitle"
description: ""
author: patriciatrisno
date: "April 28, 2025"
date-modified: "last-modified"

editor: visual
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
  code-fold: true
---
